svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Isle of Wapau, an island in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Isle of Wapau
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Isle of Wapau, an island in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=15938 type=island band=temperate land=0.34 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Hau the Wayfarer in the year 896 of the Crane Age
